declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0070_seed_language_part1.sql with the analytic-tradition core of philosophy of language at the granularity principle. Eight coverage clusters: foundation (philosophy_of_language, meaning, reference, sense_and_reference — Frege 1892, proposition); reference and names (proper_name, descriptivism, causal_theory_of_reference — Kripke 1972 / Putnam 1975, rigid_designator, definite_description, russells_theory_of_descriptions — Russell 1905); meaning theories (truth_conditional_semantics — Davidson 1967, use_theory_of_meaning — Wittgenstein PI, verificationism, compositionality_semantic); speech acts and Gricean pragmatics (speech_act — Austin/Searle, performative_utterance — Austin 1955, gricean_maxims — Grice 1975, conversational_implicature, presupposition — Strawson/Stalnaker); externalism (semantic_externalism — Putnam 1975/Burge 1979, twin_earth, narrow_content); indexicality and context (indexical, character_and_content — Kaplan 1989); truth in language (deflationary_theory_of_truth, tarskis_t_schema — Tarski 1933); adjacent (linguistic_relativity — Sapir-Whorf as the philosophically loaded edge case). ~28 nodes total, ~35 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges in a layered DAG rooted at philosophy_of_language. Append per-session narrative entry to product/seed-graph/migrations/ROUTING.md. Apply migration via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper per ADR 0055. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED. PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite). Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1 (causal_theory_of_reference ↔ metaphysics on natural kinds; semantic_externalism ↔ philosophy of mind on content externalism, ↔ epistemology on self-knowledge asymmetry; speech_act/conversational_implicature ↔ political philosophy on hate-speech and silencing; tarskis_t_schema ↔ logic; indexical ↔ philosophy of mind on de se attitudes). Two-commit pattern. End state: P5-08 complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-08 passes both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes). graph_version 12→13. Sub-range slots 0071-0079 left reserved. phase: P_5
outcome_summary: Phase 5 philosophy-of-language analytic-tradition core seed (P5-08) lands at S-0071 — twelfth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; the philosophy-of-language single-task subdomain is fully seeded at the analytic-tradition core. **Boot freshness intervention required** (first time across S-0050+): this worktree (funny-roentgen-6ec306) was 2 commits behind origin/main at session start because S-0070 closed in a different worktree (angry-kepler-3f9db4); routine_boot_freshness.py fast-forwarded cleanly via `git merge --ff-only` before reading shared-state. After FF, register_state.json showed last_claimed=S-0070, current_status=closed (S-0070 had archived cleanly); the eager-claim ritual proceeded normally for slot S-0071. 28 nodes + 31 edges across eight clusters per phase_5.md T1-B: foundation (5 — philosophy_of_language, meaning, reference, sense_and_reference (Frege 1892's Sinn und Bedeutung distinction), proposition); reference and names (6 — proper_name, descriptivism (early Russell / late Frege / Searle), causal_theory_of_reference (Kripke 1972 / Putnam 1975 / Donnellan), rigid_designator, definite_description, russells_theory_of_descriptions (Russell 1905 'On Denoting')); meaning theories (4 — truth_conditional_semantics (Davidson 1967), use_theory_of_meaning (Wittgenstein PI §43), verificationism (Vienna Circle), compositionality_semantic); speech acts and Gricean pragmatics (5 — speech_act (Austin 1955 / Searle 1969), performative_utterance (Austin's seed case), gricean_maxims (Grice 1975), conversational_implicature, presupposition (Strawson 1950 / Stalnaker)); externalism (3 — semantic_externalism (Putnam 1975 / Burge 1979), twin_earth (Putnam's canonical thought experiment), narrow_content (the internalist counterpoint — Fodor, Loar)); indexicality and context (2 — indexical, character_and_content (Kaplan 1989 Demonstratives)); truth in language (2 — deflationary_theory_of_truth (Ramsey-Quine-Horwich family), tarskis_t_schema (Tarski 1933)); adjacent (1 — linguistic_relativity / Sapir-Whorf). 5-tier layered DAG rooted at philosophy_of_language with three cross-cluster bridges (causal_theory_of_reference → semantic_externalism; truth_conditional_semantics → tarskis_t_schema; truth_conditional_semantics → character_and_content); 28/28 INTERPRETED; 0% EXTRACTED; 0% SYNTHETIC; within-domain edges only. graph_version 12→13. **Fourth load-bearing routine-mode exercise of engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper** per ADR 0055 (first S-0066, second S-0068, third S-0070) — single-call apply succeeded cleanly: shape verified twice (once at staging, once at apply), body applied via psycopg autocommit, recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version 20260505202336. Pre-stage Python integrity check (regex-extracted 28 nodes + 31 edges, all edge endpoints exist in node set, no duplicate (source, target) pairs, no cycles per DFS-based detection): all clear. check_target.py --task-id P5-08 PASS both criteria (migration_applied PASS; validate_passes PASS, exit 1 = soft-warns only). validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 297 soft-warns (289 missing_rigor_score continuing the partial-seed pattern per phase_5.md T2-C with the running total +28 from S-0070's count corresponding to the 28 newly seeded language nodes; 8 issue_collision: #1, #2 upstream MemPalace plus 6 routine-collision flags from open Issues #16, #20, #21, #22, #23, #24 — the Issues #22/#23/#24 are net-new since S-0066's audit and now appear in collision telemetry). Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim 9dfa812 + deliverable f892b9c + this close). 0 in-band Issues filed; 0 HANDOFF entries. Sub-range slots 0071-0079 left reserved. All three lifecycle pushes succeeded via routine_lifecycle_push.py (eager-claim, deliverable, close — wrapper's T1-A long-confirmed since S-0061; apply_migration's T1-A now confirmed across four routine fires S-0066/S-0068/S-0070/S-0071, durably). **Boot freshness intervention is the first cross-worktree S-0070→S-0071 case observed**: confirms routine_boot_freshness.py works correctly when sessions sequence across different worktrees (the prior S-0070 close happened in angry-kepler-3f9db4; this S-0071 fired in funny-roentgen-6ec306). Forward state: P5-08 complete; philosophy-of-language subdomain fully seeded at the analytic-tradition core; P5-09 (Philosophy of science) and P5-10 (Service nodes) remain pending and parallel-eligible; next routine fire's eligibility walk picks P5-09 in walk order. Phase 5 progress: 12/16 tasks complete; 12 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions per phase_5.md T1-C — 4 sub-tasks remaining (P5-09, P5-10, P5-11 cross-bridges, P5-12 closeout) — 6-session buffer comfortable.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was 28 nodes / ~35 edges across the eight philosophy-of-language clusters (foundation/reference-and-names/meaning-theories/speech-acts-and-pragmatics/externalism/indexicality/truth-in-language/adjacent); delivered exactly 28 nodes and 31 edges, matching the cluster decomposition (5 foundation + 6 reference-and-names + 4 meaning-theories + 5 speech-acts-and-pragmatics + 3 externalism + 2 indexicality + 2 truth-in-language + 1 adjacent = 28). Edge count came in at the lower-bound of the declared estimate (31 vs ~35); the philosophy-of-language DAG is structurally tighter than the philosophy-of-mind one because the analytic-tradition core has cleaner cluster-internal structure (each cluster has 1-2 within-cluster prerequisite edges and clean cross-cluster bridges) and fewer cross-cluster pedagogical paths than philosophy-of-mind's consciousness/qualia/hard-problem cluster. Three cross-cluster bridges (causal_theory_of_reference → semantic_externalism; truth_conditional_semantics → tarskis_t_schema; truth_conditional_semantics → character_and_content) are the analytically right ones — Putnam developed externalism directly from the causal-theoretic framework, Davidson's program is explicitly Tarskian, Kaplan's two-dimensional theory presupposes the truth-conditional skeleton. PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in registry); ROUTING.md per-session narrative appended at the chronological tail. Migration applied to paideia-dev via the apply_migration.py wrapper in a single call (no chunked-execute_sql fallback needed); recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version 20260505202336. graph_version 12→13 honored. confidence_level distribution 28/28 INTERPRETED matches phase_5.md T2-B 70% floor with margin. Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1. Pre-stage Python regex+DFS integrity check (28 nodes parsed, 31 edges parsed, all endpoints in node set, no duplicates, no cycles) clean. check_target.py --task-id P5-08 passes both criteria. validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 297 soft-warns. Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim 9dfa812 + deliverable f892b9c + close). Sub-range slots 0071-0079 left reserved. **Fourth load-bearing routine-mode exercise of apply_migration.py wrapper succeeded cleanly**: continues to confirm the subprocess-bypass pattern from ADR 0055 works repeatably in routine context across four independent fires. **First cross-worktree boot freshness intervention observed (S-0070 closed in angry-kepler-3f9db4; S-0071 fired in funny-roentgen-6ec306; routine_boot_freshness.py fast-forwarded 2 commits cleanly)** — confirms the boot-freshness mechanism handles the genuine cross-worktree sequencing case correctly.

commits.summary: seed philosophy of language analytic-tradition core — 28 nodes, 31 edges (P5-08)
